title: aloe marlothii subsp. marlothii
intro: Aloe marlothii subsp. marlothii, also known as the Krantze Aloe or Mountain Aloe, is a succulent plant species belonging to the Aloe genus, native to the mountainous regions of Southern Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its gel-filled leaves, which can be used to treat various skin irritations and conditions, such as burns, eczema, and sunburn, due to its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties. The health benefits of Aloe marlothii subsp. marlothii include promoting wound healing, reducing inflammation, and supporting skin health, making it a popular choice for topical applications. Herbal preparations of Aloe marlothii subsp. marlothii typically involve extracting the gel from the leaves and using it to create creams, ointments, and gels for external use.
